title: Style a Complete Blog Theme
description: Build a complete CSS theme for a blog from scratch, adding styling features chapter by chapter. By the end, you'll have a fully responsive, animated, and visually polished blog theme — all using concepts from the book.
final_description: A complete blog theme with typography, colors, box model layout, flexbox navigation, CSS Grid content area, responsive media queries, transitions, animations, custom properties for theming, and print styles — built across 10 chapters using progressively advanced CSS concepts.
